tagline: Family-owned taqueria serving authentic Mexican flavors in Santa Rosa's Roseland District since 2017
seoDescription: Del Valle Mexican Restaurant in Santa Rosa, CA. Authentic family-owned Mexican food, mariscos, tacos, burritos and catering on Sebastopol Rd.
heroSubheading: A family-owned cornerstone of Santa Rosa's Roseland District since 2017, serving rich, traditional Mexican cooking — from tacos and mariscos to molcajetes and catering.
highlights: Family-owned and serving Santa Rosa since 2017
Authentic mariscos including molcajete de mariscos and ceviche tostadas
Full catering with taco bars, burrito bowls, fajitas, pozole and birria
aboutBody: Since 2017, Del Valle Mexican Restaurant has been a cornerstone of Santa Rosa's Roseland District, serving up the rich, authentic flavors of Mexico with exceptional service. This family-owned spot on Sebastopol Road brings bold, traditional tastes to the neighborhood seven days a week.

From sizzling fajitas and hearty molcajetes to fresh mariscos, a recently added breakfast menu and street-style tacos, the kitchen cooks the dishes families grew up on. Regulars come back for the molcajete de mariscos, super burritos, carne asada, chimichangas and shrimp tacos. Whether you dine in, order takeout, or book catering for an event, Del Valle delivers the genuine taste of home.

services.title: Tacos
services.description: Street-style tacos with your choice of meats, plus fish tacos topped with fresh ingredients.

services.title: Burritos
services.description: Regular and Super Burritos with rice, beans and up to eight meat choices, wrapped to order.

services.title: Mariscos
services.description: Seafood specialties like molcajete de mariscos, ceviche and shrimp tostadas, and camarones con tocino.

services.title: Molcajetes & Fajitas
services.description: Steak, chicken, shrimp or mixed molcajetes and fajitas served with rice, beans and tortillas.

services.title: Breakfast
services.description: Morning plates including chilaquiles con huevo, huevos con bistec and traditional Mexican breakfasts.

services.title: Catering
services.description: Taco bars, burrito bowls, quesadillas, sopes, tortas and large-batch pozole, menudo and birria for events.

notes: VERIFIED June 2026. Official site delvallemex.com confirmed. Phone (707) 595-1081 confirmed on site + Yelp/DoorDash. Address 2000 Sebastopol Rd, Santa Rosa CA 95407 confirmed. Public email luz@delvallemex.com pulled directly from the official site footer (real, verified). Established 'Since 2017' confirmed verbatim from delvallemex.com catering page (opened June 2017). Family-owned and Roseland District location confirmed. HOURS CONFLICT across the site itself: the locations page lists Mon-Thu 10-8 / Fri-Sat 9-9 / Sun 8-8, while the homepage hours table shows Mon-Thu 10-9 / Fri-Sat 10-10 / Sun 10-10. Kept the locations-page schedule; confirm with the owner before publishing. Rating set to Google 4.4/413 (RestaurantGuru aggregate of Google reviews) as the strongest verified figure; Restaurantji separately shows 4.3/148, Yelp ~4.0/129. Signature dishes corroborated across Restaurantji + RestaurantGuru: molcajete de mariscos, super burrito, carne asada, chimichanga, shrimp/fish tacos, chicken fajitas, chile relleno. No verbatim attributed review quotes confirmed from a primary source, so testimonials left empty. Photo URLs are real, from the restaurant's own Squarespace gallery (delvallemex.com/gallery).
